title: FindingOutcome
description: Per-finding maintainer-action correlation record (phase 9d). Separate ledger from outcomes.jsonl (phase 9a phase-level verdicts).

finding_outcome_id.description: ULID for this outcome row (Crockford base32, 26 chars).

finding_id.description: FK to findings.jsonl finding_id (Crockford base32, 26 chars).

observed_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when this outcome was recorded (join-outcomes run time).

maintainer_action.description: Observed maintainer response to the finding.

followup_ref.description: Commit SHA (hotfix_within_14d), bd issue id (followup_issue), or PR number string (followup_pr/followup_issue). null for ignored/commented/fixed_in_same_pr.

time_to_action_hours.description: Hours from PR merge to first maintainer action on this finding. null if not measurable.

time_to_fix_hours.description: Hours from PR merge to hotfix commit. Only set for hotfix_within_14d. null otherwise.

recurrence_of.description: stable_finding_hash_v1 of a prior finding this is a recurrence of. null if not a recurrence.

schema_ok.description: Always true when written by join-outcomes; false signals schema violation.
